creator: kkennawa@physics.adelaide.edu.au
text:
On Wed, 17 Feb 1999, Stefan `Sec` Zehl wrote:

> This is the new lynx-ssl port. It builds lynx with support for ssl.

I haven't looked at the port yet, but is this just a modified version of the
lynx port, with something like --enable-ssl turned on? It may be more
efficient to just add a USE_SSL variable in the port makefile and hang off
that.

Kris

-----
(ASP) Microsoft Corporation (MSFT) announced today that the release of its 
productivity suite, Office 2000, will be delayed until the first quarter
of 1901.
